hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qi "\.env" && { echo "Blocked: do not edit .env files" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css)$" && cd "d:/DEV/ai-advent" && npx biome check --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; exit 0'

bash -c 'f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; pat=""; if echo "$f" | grep -qE "[/\\]entities[/\\]"; then pat="@/(views|widgets|features)/"; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE "[/\\]features[/\\]"; then pat="@/(views|widgets)/"; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE "[/\\]widgets[/\\]"; then pat="@/views/"; fi; [ -z "$pat" ] && exit 0; grep -qE "$pat" "$f" && { echo "FSD VIOLATION: illegal upward import" >&2; grep -nE "$pat" "$f" >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0'
